self_learning_record_upsert.postgresqlSql: WITH input AS (SELECT %s::uuid AS learning_record_id, %s::jsonb AS record_json, %s::text AS created_by), upsert_record AS (INSERT INTO decisioning.run_learnings (learning_record_id, learning_key, title, summary, learning_category, confidence_posture, promotion_readiness, workflow_run_id, step_run_id, agent_turn_id, primary_artifact_id, cluster_key, affected_workflow_slug, affected_step_key, target_seed_kind, target_seed_profile_id, target_seed_profile_key, target_seed_profile_version_id, suggested_change_json, expected_effect_json, governance_notes, operator_notes, metadata_json, created_by) SELECT input.learning_record_id, input.record_json->>'learning_key', input.record_json->>'title', input.record_json->>'summary', input.record_json->>'learning_category', input.record_json->>'confidence_posture', input.record_json->>'promotion_readiness', NULLIF(input.record_json->>'workflow_run_id', ''), NULLIF(input.record_json->>'step_run_id', ''), NULLIF(input.record_json->>'agent_turn_id', ''), NULLIF(input.record_json->>'primary_artifact_id', ''), NULLIF(input.record_json->>'cluster_key', ''), NULLIF(input.record_json->>'affected_workflow_slug', ''), NULLIF(input.record_json->>'affected_step_key', ''), NULLIF(input.record_json->>'target_seed_kind', ''), NULLIF(input.record_json->>'target_seed_profile_id', ''), NULLIF(input.record_json->>'target_seed_profile_key', ''), NULLIF(input.record_json->>'target_seed_profile_version_id', ''), COALESCE(input.record_json->'suggested_change', '{}'::jsonb), COALESCE(input.record_json->'expected_effect', '{}'::jsonb), NULLIF(input.record_json->>'governance_notes', ''), NULLIF(input.record_json->>'operator_notes', ''), COALESCE(input.record_json->'metadata', '{}'::jsonb), COALESCE(NULLIF(input.created_by, ''), NULLIF(input.record_json->>'created_by', '')) FROM input ON CONFLICT (learning_record_id) DO UPDATE SET learning_key = EXCLUDED.learning_key, title = EXCLUDED.title, summary = EXCLUDED.summary, learning_category = EXCLUDED.learning_category, confidence_posture = EXCLUDED.confidence_posture, promotion_readiness = EXCLUDED.promotion_readiness, workflow_run_id = EXCLUDED.workflow_run_id, step_run_id = EXCLUDED.step_run_id, agent_turn_id = EXCLUDED.agent_turn_id, primary_artifact_id = EXCLUDED.primary_artifact_id, cluster_key = EXCLUDED.cluster_key, affected_workflow_slug = EXCLUDED.affected_workflow_slug, affected_step_key = EXCLUDED.affected_step_key, target_seed_kind = EXCLUDED.target_seed_kind, target_seed_profile_id = EXCLUDED.target_seed_profile_id, target_seed_profile_key = EXCLUDED.target_seed_profile_key, target_seed_profile_version_id = EXCLUDED.target_seed_profile_version_id, suggested_change_json = EXCLUDED.suggested_change_json, expected_effect_json = EXCLUDED.expected_effect_json, governance_notes = EXCLUDED.governance_notes, operator_notes = EXCLUDED.operator_notes, metadata_json = EXCLUDED.metadata_json, created_by = EXCLUDED.created_by, updated_at = NOW() RETURNING learning_record_id), delete_links AS (DELETE FROM decisioning.learning_evidence_links WHERE learning_record_id = (SELECT learning_record_id FROM input)), delete_actions AS (DELETE FROM decisioning.learning_suggested_actions WHERE learning_record_id = (SELECT learning_record_id FROM input)), insert_links AS (INSERT INTO decisioning.learning_evidence_links (learning_evidence_link_id, learning_record_id, evidence_posture, source_type, source_ref, workflow_run_id, step_run_id, agent_turn_id, artifact_id, decision_record_id, policy_evaluation_id, metric_key, metric_value, is_primary, metadata_json) SELECT md5((SELECT learning_record_id::text FROM input) || ':evidence:' || evidence.ordinal::text)::uuid, (SELECT learning_record_id FROM input), COALESCE(evidence.item->>'evidence_posture', 'measured'), COALESCE(evidence.item->>'source_type', 'unknown'), COALESCE(evidence.item->>'source_ref', ''), NULLIF(evidence.item->>'workflow_run_id', ''), NULLIF(evidence.item->>'step_run_id', ''), NULLIF(evidence.item->>'agent_turn_id', ''), NULLIF(evidence.item->>'artifact_id', ''), NULLIF(evidence.item->>'decision_record_id', ''), NULLIF(evidence.item->>'policy_evaluation_id', ''), NULLIF(evidence.item->>'metric_key', ''), NULLIF(evidence.item->>'metric_value', '')::numeric, CASE WHEN lower(COALESCE(evidence.item->>'is_primary', 'false')) IN ('1', 'true', 'yes') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, COALESCE(evidence.item->'metadata', '{}'::jsonb) FROM input LEFT JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(input.record_json->'evidence_refs', '[]'::jsonb)) WITH ORDINALITY AS evidence(item, ordinal) ON TRUE WHERE evidence.item IS NOT NULL), insert_actions AS (INSERT INTO decisioning.learning_suggested_actions (learning_suggested_action_id, learning_record_id, action_type, target_type, target_ref, rationale, governance_required, minimum_evidence_count, minimum_confidence) SELECT md5((SELECT learning_record_id::text FROM input) || ':action:' || action.ordinal::text)::uuid, (SELECT learning_record_id FROM input), COALESCE(action.item->>'action_type', 'observe_only'), COALESCE(action.item->>'target_type', 'workflow_update'), NULLIF(action.item->>'target_ref', ''), COALESCE(action.item->>'rationale', ''), CASE WHEN lower(COALESCE(action.item->>'governance_required', 'true')) IN ('1', 'true', 'yes') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, COALESCE(NULLIF(action.item->>'minimum_evidence_count', '')::integer, 1), COALESCE(action.item->>'minimum_confidence', 'review_required') FROM input LEFT JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(input.record_json->'suggested_actions', '[]'::jsonb)) WITH ORDINALITY AS action(item, ordinal) ON TRUE WHERE action.item IS NOT NULL) SELECT rl.learning_record_id, rl.created_at, rl.updated_at FROM decisioning.run_learnings rl JOIN input ON input.learning_record_id = rl.learning_record_id
self_learning_record_upsert.sqlServerSql: DECLARE @learning_record_id uniqueidentifier = ?; DECLARE @record_json nvarchar(max) = ?; DECLARE @created_by nvarchar(max) = ?; /* PostgreSQL source of truth; SQL Server parity can be materialized with OPENJSON when enabled. */

self_learning_record_list.postgresqlSql: WITH input AS (SELECT %s::text AS workflow_run_id, %s::text AS learning_category, %s::text AS promotion_readiness, %s::integer AS limit_value) SELECT rl.learning_record_id, rl.learning_key, rl.title, rl.summary, rl.learning_category, rl.confidence_posture, rl.promotion_readiness, rl.workflow_run_id, rl.step_run_id, rl.agent_turn_id, rl.primary_artifact_id, rl.cluster_key, rl.affected_workflow_slug, rl.affected_step_key, rl.target_seed_kind, rl.target_seed_profile_id, rl.target_seed_profile_key, rl.target_seed_profile_version_id, rl.suggested_change_json, rl.expected_effect_json, rl.governance_notes, rl.operator_notes, rl.metadata_json, rl.created_at, rl.updated_at, COALESCE(evidence_refs.evidence_refs, '[]'::jsonb) AS evidence_refs, COALESCE(suggested_actions.suggested_actions, '[]'::jsonb) AS suggested_actions FROM decisioning.run_learnings rl CROSS JOIN input LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('evidence_posture', lel.evidence_posture, 'source_type', lel.source_type, 'source_ref', lel.source_ref, 'workflow_run_id', lel.workflow_run_id, 'step_run_id', lel.step_run_id, 'agent_turn_id', lel.agent_turn_id, 'artifact_id', lel.artifact_id, 'decision_record_id', lel.decision_record_id, 'policy_evaluation_id', lel.policy_evaluation_id, 'metric_key', lel.metric_key, 'metric_value', lel.metric_value, 'is_primary', lel.is_primary, 'metadata', lel.metadata_json) ORDER BY lel.created_at ASC) AS evidence_refs FROM decisioning.learning_evidence_links lel WHERE lel.learning_record_id = rl.learning_record_id) evidence_refs ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('action_type', sla.action_type, 'target_type', sla.target_type, 'target_ref', sla.target_ref, 'rationale', sla.rationale, 'governance_required', sla.governance_required, 'minimum_evidence_count', sla.minimum_evidence_count, 'minimum_confidence', sla.minimum_confidence) ORDER BY sla.created_at ASC) AS suggested_actions FROM decisioning.learning_suggested_actions sla WHERE sla.learning_record_id = rl.learning_record_id) suggested_actions ON TRUE WHERE (input.workflow_run_id IS NULL OR rl.workflow_run_id = input.workflow_run_id) AND (input.learning_category IS NULL OR rl.learning_category = input.learning_category) AND (input.promotion_readiness IS NULL OR rl.promotion_readiness = input.promotion_readiness) ORDER BY rl.created_at DESC LIMIT input.limit_value
self_learning_record_list.sqlServerSql: SELECT TOP (?) rl.learning_record_id, rl.learning_key, rl.title, rl.summary, rl.learning_category, rl.confidence_posture, rl.promotion_readiness, rl.workflow_run_id, rl.step_run_id, rl.agent_turn_id, rl.primary_artifact_id, rl.cluster_key, rl.affected_workflow_slug, rl.affected_step_key, rl.target_seed_kind, rl.target_seed_profile_id, rl.target_seed_profile_key, rl.target_seed_profile_version_id, rl.suggested_change_json, rl.expected_effect_json, rl.governance_notes, rl.operator_notes, rl.metadata_json, rl.created_at, rl.updated_at FROM decisioning.run_learnings rl WHERE (? IS NULL OR rl.workflow_run_id = ?) AND (? IS NULL OR rl.learning_category = ?) AND (? IS NULL OR rl.promotion_readiness = ?) ORDER BY rl.created_at DESC

self_learning_record_get.postgresqlSql: WITH input AS (SELECT %s::uuid AS learning_record_id) SELECT rl.learning_record_id, rl.learning_key, rl.title, rl.summary, rl.learning_category, rl.confidence_posture, rl.promotion_readiness, rl.workflow_run_id, rl.step_run_id, rl.agent_turn_id, rl.primary_artifact_id, rl.cluster_key, rl.affected_workflow_slug, rl.affected_step_key, rl.target_seed_kind, rl.target_seed_profile_id, rl.target_seed_profile_key, rl.target_seed_profile_version_id, rl.suggested_change_json, rl.expected_effect_json, rl.governance_notes, rl.operator_notes, rl.metadata_json, rl.created_at, rl.updated_at, COALESCE(evidence_refs.evidence_refs, '[]'::jsonb) AS evidence_refs, COALESCE(suggested_actions.suggested_actions, '[]'::jsonb) AS suggested_actions FROM decisioning.run_learnings rl CROSS JOIN input LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('evidence_posture', lel.evidence_posture, 'source_type', lel.source_type, 'source_ref', lel.source_ref, 'workflow_run_id', lel.workflow_run_id, 'step_run_id', lel.step_run_id, 'agent_turn_id', lel.agent_turn_id, 'artifact_id', lel.artifact_id, 'decision_record_id', lel.decision_record_id, 'policy_evaluation_id', lel.policy_evaluation_id, 'metric_key', lel.metric_key, 'metric_value', lel.metric_value, 'is_primary', lel.is_primary, 'metadata', lel.metadata_json) ORDER BY lel.created_at ASC) AS evidence_refs FROM decisioning.learning_evidence_links lel WHERE lel.learning_record_id = rl.learning_record_id) evidence_refs ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('action_type', sla.action_type, 'target_type', sla.target_type, 'target_ref', sla.target_ref, 'rationale', sla.rationale, 'governance_required', sla.governance_required, 'minimum_evidence_count', sla.minimum_evidence_count, 'minimum_confidence', sla.minimum_confidence) ORDER BY sla.created_at ASC) AS suggested_actions FROM decisioning.learning_suggested_actions sla WHERE sla.learning_record_id = rl.learning_record_id) suggested_actions ON TRUE WHERE rl.learning_record_id = input.learning_record_id LIMIT 1
self_learning_record_get.sqlServerSql: SELECT TOP (1) rl.learning_record_id, rl.learning_key, rl.title, rl.summary, rl.learning_category, rl.confidence_posture, rl.promotion_readiness, rl.workflow_run_id, rl.step_run_id, rl.agent_turn_id, rl.primary_artifact_id, rl.cluster_key, rl.affected_workflow_slug, rl.affected_step_key, rl.target_seed_kind, rl.target_seed_profile_id, rl.target_seed_profile_key, rl.target_seed_profile_version_id, rl.suggested_change_json, rl.expected_effect_json, rl.governance_notes, rl.operator_notes, rl.metadata_json, rl.created_at, rl.updated_at FROM decisioning.run_learnings rl WHERE rl.learning_record_id = ?

self_learning_posture.postgresqlSql: WITH input AS (SELECT %s::text AS workflow_run_id) SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_learning_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rl.learning_category = 'optimization') AS optimization_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rl.learning_category = 'failure_pattern') AS failure_pattern_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rl.learning_category = 'governance_pattern') AS governance_pattern_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rl.promotion_readiness = 'candidate') AS candidate_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rl.promotion_readiness = 'review_blocked') AS review_blocked_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rl.confidence_posture = 'high') AS high_confidence_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rl.confidence_posture = 'medium') AS medium_confidence_count, MAX(rl.created_at) AS latest_learning_at FROM decisioning.run_learnings rl CROSS JOIN input WHERE (input.workflow_run_id IS NULL OR rl.workflow_run_id = input.workflow_run_id)
self_learning_posture.sqlServerSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_learning_count FROM decisioning.run_learnings

self_learning_promotion_candidate_upsert.postgresqlSql: WITH input AS (SELECT %s::jsonb AS candidate_json, %s::text AS created_by), upsert_candidate AS (INSERT INTO decisioning.learning_promotion_candidates (learning_promotion_candidate_id, candidate_key, title, summary, learning_category, confidence_posture, promotion_readiness, source_cluster_key, affected_workflow_slug, affected_step_key, target_seed_kind, target_seed_profile_id, target_seed_profile_key, target_seed_profile_version_id, proposed_seed_change_json, expected_effect_json, requires_seed_change_set, workflow_scope_count, learning_record_count, first_learning_at, latest_learning_at, governance_notes, metadata_json, created_by) SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(input.candidate_json->>'learning_promotion_candidate_id', ''), md5(COALESCE(input.candidate_json->>'candidate_key', '') || ':candidate')::uuid), input.candidate_json->>'candidate_key', input.candidate_json->>'title', input.candidate_json->>'summary', input.candidate_json->>'learning_category', input.candidate_json->>'confidence_posture', input.candidate_json->>'promotion_readiness', input.candidate_json->>'source_cluster_key', input.candidate_json->>'affected_workflow_slug', input.candidate_json->>'affected_step_key', input.candidate_json->>'target_seed_kind', input.candidate_json->>'target_seed_profile_id', input.candidate_json->>'target_seed_profile_key', input.candidate_json->>'target_seed_profile_version_id', COALESCE(input.candidate_json->'proposed_seed_change', '{}'::jsonb), COALESCE(input.candidate_json->'expected_effect', '{}'::jsonb), COALESCE((input.candidate_json->>'requires_seed_change_set')::boolean, TRUE), COALESCE((input.candidate_json->>'workflow_scope_count')::integer, 1), COALESCE((input.candidate_json->>'learning_record_count')::integer, 1), NULLIF(input.candidate_json->'metadata'->>'first_learning_at', '')::timestamptz, NULLIF(input.candidate_json->'metadata'->>'latest_learning_at', '')::timestamptz, NULLIF(input.candidate_json->>'governance_notes', ''), COALESCE(input.candidate_json->'metadata', '{}'::jsonb), COALESCE(NULLIF(input.created_by, ''), NULLIF(input.candidate_json->>'created_by', '')) FROM input ON CONFLICT (candidate_key) DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title, summary = EXCLUDED.summary, learning_category = EXCLUDED.learning_category, confidence_posture = EXCLUDED.confidence_posture, promotion_readiness = EXCLUDED.promotion_readiness, source_cluster_key = EXCLUDED.source_cluster_key, affected_workflow_slug = EXCLUDED.affected_workflow_slug, affected_step_key = EXCLUDED.affected_step_key, target_seed_kind = EXCLUDED.target_seed_kind, target_seed_profile_id = EXCLUDED.target_seed_profile_id, target_seed_profile_key = EXCLUDED.target_seed_profile_key, target_seed_profile_version_id = EXCLUDED.target_seed_profile_version_id, proposed_seed_change_json = EXCLUDED.proposed_seed_change_json, expected_effect_json = EXCLUDED.expected_effect_json, requires_seed_change_set = EXCLUDED.requires_seed_change_set, workflow_scope_count = EXCLUDED.workflow_scope_count, learning_record_count = EXCLUDED.learning_record_count, first_learning_at = EXCLUDED.first_learning_at, latest_learning_at = EXCLUDED.latest_learning_at, governance_notes = EXCLUDED.governance_notes, metadata_json = EXCLUDED.metadata_json, created_by = EXCLUDED.created_by, updated_at = NOW() RETURNING learning_promotion_candidate_id), delete_members AS (DELETE FROM decisioning.learning_promotion_candidate_records WHERE learning_promotion_candidate_id = (SELECT learning_promotion_candidate_id FROM upsert_candidate)), insert_members AS (INSERT INTO decisioning.learning_promotion_candidate_records (learning_promotion_candidate_record_id, learning_promotion_candidate_id, learning_record_id, sort_order, is_primary) SELECT md5((SELECT learning_promotion_candidate_id::text FROM upsert_candidate) || ':member:' || member.ordinal::text)::uuid, (SELECT learning_promotion_candidate_id FROM upsert_candidate), member.item->>'learning_record_id', member.ordinal - 1, CASE WHEN member.ordinal = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM input LEFT JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(input.candidate_json->'members', '[]'::jsonb)) WITH ORDINALITY AS member(item, ordinal) ON TRUE WHERE member.item IS NOT NULL) SELECT learning_promotion_candidate_id, created_at, updated_at FROM decisioning.learning_promotion_candidates WHERE learning_promotion_candidate_id = (SELECT learning_promotion_candidate_id FROM upsert_candidate)
self_learning_promotion_candidate_upsert.sqlServerSql: DECLARE @candidate_json nvarchar(max) = ?; DECLARE @created_by nvarchar(max) = ?; /* PostgreSQL source of truth; SQL Server parity can be materialized with OPENJSON when enabled. */

self_learning_promotion_candidate_list.postgresqlSql: WITH input AS (SELECT %s::text AS workflow_run_id, %s::text AS learning_category, %s::text AS promotion_readiness, %s::integer AS limit_value) SELECT lpc.learning_promotion_candidate_id, lpc.candidate_key, lpc.title, lpc.summary, lpc.learning_category, lpc.confidence_posture, lpc.promotion_readiness, lpc.source_cluster_key, lpc.affected_workflow_slug, lpc.affected_step_key, lpc.target_seed_kind, lpc.target_seed_profile_id, lpc.target_seed_profile_key, lpc.target_seed_profile_version_id, lpc.proposed_seed_change_json, lpc.expected_effect_json, lpc.requires_seed_change_set, lpc.workflow_scope_count, lpc.learning_record_count, lpc.first_learning_at, lpc.latest_learning_at, lpc.governance_notes, lpc.metadata_json, lpc.created_at, lpc.updated_at, COALESCE(members.members, '[]'::jsonb) AS members FROM decisioning.learning_promotion_candidates lpc CROSS JOIN input LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('learning_record_id', rl.learning_record_id, 'learning_key', rl.learning_key, 'workflow_run_id', rl.workflow_run_id, 'confidence_posture', rl.confidence_posture, 'promotion_readiness', rl.promotion_readiness, 'observed_at', rl.created_at, 'evidence_count', COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM decisioning.learning_evidence_links lel WHERE lel.learning_record_id = rl.learning_record_id), 0)) ORDER BY lpcr.sort_order ASC) AS members FROM decisioning.learning_promotion_candidate_records lpcr INNER JOIN decisioning.run_learnings rl ON rl.learning_record_id = lpcr.learning_record_id WHERE lpcr.learning_promotion_candidate_id = lpc.learning_promotion_candidate_id) members ON TRUE WHERE (input.workflow_run_id IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM decisioning.learning_promotion_candidate_records lpcr INNER JOIN decisioning.run_learnings rl ON rl.learning_record_id = lpcr.learning_record_id WHERE lpcr.learning_promotion_candidate_id = lpc.learning_promotion_candidate_id AND rl.workflow_run_id = input.workflow_run_id)) AND (input.learning_category IS NULL OR lpc.learning_category = input.learning_category) AND (input.promotion_readiness IS NULL OR lpc.promotion_readiness = input.promotion_readiness) ORDER BY lpc.latest_learning_at DESC, lpc.created_at DESC LIMIT input.limit_value
self_learning_promotion_candidate_list.sqlServerSql: SELECT TOP (?) lpc.learning_promotion_candidate_id, lpc.candidate_key, lpc.title, lpc.summary, lpc.learning_category, lpc.confidence_posture, lpc.promotion_readiness FROM decisioning.learning_promotion_candidates lpc WHERE (? IS NULL OR lpc.learning_category = ?) AND (? IS NULL OR lpc.promotion_readiness = ?)

self_learning_promotion_candidate_get.postgresqlSql: WITH input AS (SELECT %s::text AS candidate_key) SELECT lpc.learning_promotion_candidate_id, lpc.candidate_key, lpc.title, lpc.summary, lpc.learning_category, lpc.confidence_posture, lpc.promotion_readiness, lpc.source_cluster_key, lpc.affected_workflow_slug, lpc.affected_step_key, lpc.target_seed_kind, lpc.target_seed_profile_id, lpc.target_seed_profile_key, lpc.target_seed_profile_version_id, lpc.proposed_seed_change_json, lpc.expected_effect_json, lpc.requires_seed_change_set, lpc.workflow_scope_count, lpc.learning_record_count, lpc.first_learning_at, lpc.latest_learning_at, lpc.governance_notes, lpc.metadata_json, lpc.created_at, lpc.updated_at, COALESCE(members.members, '[]'::jsonb) AS members FROM decisioning.learning_promotion_candidates lpc CROSS JOIN input LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('learning_record_id', rl.learning_record_id, 'learning_key', rl.learning_key, 'workflow_run_id', rl.workflow_run_id, 'confidence_posture', rl.confidence_posture, 'promotion_readiness', rl.promotion_readiness, 'observed_at', rl.created_at, 'evidence_count', COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM decisioning.learning_evidence_links lel WHERE lel.learning_record_id = rl.learning_record_id), 0)) ORDER BY lpcr.sort_order ASC) AS members FROM decisioning.learning_promotion_candidate_records lpcr INNER JOIN decisioning.run_learnings rl ON rl.learning_record_id = lpcr.learning_record_id WHERE lpcr.learning_promotion_candidate_id = lpc.learning_promotion_candidate_id) members ON TRUE WHERE lpc.candidate_key = input.candidate_key LIMIT 1
self_learning_promotion_candidate_get.sqlServerSql: SELECT TOP (1) lpc.learning_promotion_candidate_id, lpc.candidate_key, lpc.title, lpc.summary FROM decisioning.learning_promotion_candidates lpc WHERE lpc.candidate_key = ?

self_learning_promotion_flow_upsert.postgresqlSql: WITH input AS (SELECT %s::jsonb AS flow_json, %s::text AS created_by), upsert_flow AS (INSERT INTO decisioning.learning_promotion_flows (learning_promotion_flow_id, promotion_flow_key, candidate_key, title, summary, target_type, target_ref, source_action_type, flow_status, requires_governance, governance_rationale, proposed_change_json, metadata_json, created_by) SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(input.flow_json->>'learning_promotion_flow_id', ''), md5(COALESCE(input.flow_json->>'promotion_flow_key', '') || ':flow')::uuid), input.flow_json->>'promotion_flow_key', input.flow_json->>'candidate_key', input.flow_json->>'title', input.flow_json->>'summary', input.flow_json->>'target_type', NULLIF(input.flow_json->>'target_ref', ''), input.flow_json->>'source_action_type', COALESCE(input.flow_json->>'flow_status', 'pending_review'), COALESCE((input.flow_json->>'requires_governance')::boolean, TRUE), NULLIF(input.flow_json->>'governance_rationale', ''), COALESCE(input.flow_json->'proposed_change', '{}'::jsonb), COALESCE(input.flow_json->'metadata', '{}'::jsonb), COALESCE(NULLIF(input.created_by, ''), NULLIF(input.flow_json->>'created_by', '')) FROM input ON CONFLICT (promotion_flow_key) DO UPDATE SET candidate_key = EXCLUDED.candidate_key, title = EXCLUDED.title, summary = EXCLUDED.summary, target_type = EXCLUDED.target_type, target_ref = EXCLUDED.target_ref, source_action_type = EXCLUDED.source_action_type, flow_status = EXCLUDED.flow_status, requires_governance = EXCLUDED.requires_governance, governance_rationale = EXCLUDED.governance_rationale, proposed_change_json = EXCLUDED.proposed_change_json, metadata_json = EXCLUDED.metadata_json, created_by = EXCLUDED.created_by, updated_at = NOW() RETURNING learning_promotion_flow_id) SELECT learning_promotion_flow_id, created_at, updated_at FROM decisioning.learning_promotion_flows WHERE learning_promotion_flow_id = (SELECT learning_promotion_flow_id FROM upsert_flow)
self_learning_promotion_flow_upsert.sqlServerSql: DECLARE @flow_json nvarchar(max) = ?; DECLARE @created_by nvarchar(max) = ?; /* PostgreSQL source of truth; SQL Server parity can be materialized with OPENJSON when enabled. */

self_learning_promotion_flow_list.postgresqlSql: WITH input AS (SELECT %s::text AS flow_status, %s::text AS target_type, %s::text AS candidate_key, %s::integer AS limit_value) SELECT lpf.learning_promotion_flow_id, lpf.promotion_flow_key, lpf.candidate_key, lpf.title, lpf.summary, lpf.target_type, lpf.target_ref, lpf.source_action_type, lpf.flow_status, lpf.requires_governance, lpf.governance_rationale, lpf.proposed_change_json, lpf.metadata_json, lpf.created_at, lpf.updated_at, COALESCE(latest_decision.latest_decision, NULL) AS latest_decision FROM decisioning.learning_promotion_flows lpf CROSS JOIN input LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT jsonb_build_object('learning_promotion_flow_decision_id', lpfd.learning_promotion_flow_decision_id, 'learning_promotion_flow_id', lpfd.learning_promotion_flow_id, 'decision', lpfd.decision, 'rationale', lpfd.rationale, 'decision_notes', lpfd.decision_notes_json, 'decided_by', lpfd.decided_by, 'decided_at', lpfd.decided_at) AS latest_decision FROM decisioning.learning_promotion_flow_decisions lpfd WHERE lpfd.learning_promotion_flow_id = lpf.learning_promotion_flow_id ORDER BY lpfd.decided_at DESC, lpfd.created_at DESC LIMIT 1) latest_decision ON TRUE WHERE (input.flow_status IS NULL OR lpf.flow_status = input.flow_status) AND (input.target_type IS NULL OR lpf.target_type = input.target_type) AND (input.candidate_key IS NULL OR lpf.candidate_key = input.candidate_key) ORDER BY lpf.updated_at DESC, lpf.created_at DESC LIMIT input.limit_value
self_learning_promotion_flow_list.sqlServerSql: SELECT TOP (?) lpf.learning_promotion_flow_id, lpf.promotion_flow_key, lpf.candidate_key, lpf.title, lpf.summary, lpf.target_type, lpf.target_ref, lpf.source_action_type, lpf.flow_status FROM decisioning.learning_promotion_flows lpf WHERE (? IS NULL OR lpf.flow_status = ?) AND (? IS NULL OR lpf.target_type = ?) AND (? IS NULL OR lpf.candidate_key = ?)

self_learning_promotion_flow_get.postgresqlSql: WITH input AS (SELECT %s::text AS promotion_flow_key) SELECT lpf.learning_promotion_flow_id, lpf.promotion_flow_key, lpf.candidate_key, lpf.title, lpf.summary, lpf.target_type, lpf.target_ref, lpf.source_action_type, lpf.flow_status, lpf.requires_governance, lpf.governance_rationale, lpf.proposed_change_json, lpf.metadata_json, lpf.created_at, lpf.updated_at, COALESCE(latest_decision.latest_decision, NULL) AS latest_decision FROM decisioning.learning_promotion_flows lpf CROSS JOIN input LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT jsonb_build_object('learning_promotion_flow_decision_id', lpfd.learning_promotion_flow_decision_id, 'learning_promotion_flow_id', lpfd.learning_promotion_flow_id, 'decision', lpfd.decision, 'rationale', lpfd.rationale, 'decision_notes', lpfd.decision_notes_json, 'decided_by', lpfd.decided_by, 'decided_at', lpfd.decided_at) AS latest_decision FROM decisioning.learning_promotion_flow_decisions lpfd WHERE lpfd.learning_promotion_flow_id = lpf.learning_promotion_flow_id ORDER BY lpfd.decided_at DESC, lpfd.created_at DESC LIMIT 1) latest_decision ON TRUE WHERE lpf.promotion_flow_key = input.promotion_flow_key LIMIT 1
self_learning_promotion_flow_get.sqlServerSql: SELECT TOP (1) lpf.learning_promotion_flow_id, lpf.promotion_flow_key, lpf.candidate_key, lpf.title, lpf.summary, lpf.target_type, lpf.target_ref, lpf.source_action_type, lpf.flow_status FROM decisioning.learning_promotion_flows lpf WHERE lpf.promotion_flow_key = ?

self_learning_promotion_flow_decision_re.postgresqlSql: WITH input AS (SELECT %s::text AS promotion_flow_key, %s::jsonb AS decision_json), selected_flow AS (SELECT learning_promotion_flow_id FROM decisioning.learning_promotion_flows WHERE promotion_flow_key = (SELECT promotion_flow_key FROM input) LIMIT 1), inserted_decision AS (INSERT INTO decisioning.learning_promotion_flow_decisions (learning_promotion_flow_decision_id, learning_promotion_flow_id, decision, rationale, decision_notes_json, decided_by) SELECT md5((SELECT learning_promotion_flow_id::text FROM selected_flow) || ':decision:' || COALESCE(input.decision_json->>'decided_by', '') || ':' || COALESCE(input.decision_json->>'decision', ''))::uuid, selected_flow.learning_promotion_flow_id, input.decision_json->>'decision', input.decision_json->>'rationale', COALESCE(input.decision_json->'decision_notes', '{}'::jsonb), input.decision_json->>'decided_by' FROM input, selected_flow RETURNING learning_promotion_flow_decision_id, learning_promotion_flow_id, decision, rationale, decision_notes_json, decided_by, decided_at), updated_flow AS (UPDATE decisioning.learning_promotion_flows SET flow_status = CASE WHEN (SELECT decision FROM inserted_decision) = 'approved' THEN 'approved' ELSE 'rejected' END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE learning_promotion_flow_id = (SELECT learning_promotion_flow_id FROM selected_flow)) SELECT learning_promotion_flow_decision_id, learning_promotion_flow_id, decision, rationale, decision_notes_json AS decision_notes, decided_by, decided_at FROM inserted_decision
self_learning_promotion_flow_decision_re.sqlServerSql: DECLARE @promotion_flow_key nvarchar(max) = ?; DECLARE @decision_json nvarchar(max) = ?; /* PostgreSQL source of truth; SQL Server parity can be materialized with OPENJSON when enabled. */
